scripts.//extract: Build steps that produce inputs the Astro pages depend on.
scripts.extract:notebooks: uv run --project ../ppvm-python --with jupytext --with nbconvert --with nbclient --with ipykernel --with matplotlib --with numpy --with bleach --with tqdm python scripts/build-notebooks.py
scripts.extract: npm run extract:rust && npm run extract:python && npm run extract:notebooks
scripts.//astro: Raw Astro commands — use these only if you've extracted the inputs yourself.
scripts.//run: Default entry points: extract everything first, then start the server / produce dist/.
scripts.dev: npm run extract && npm run astro:dev
scripts.build: npm run extract && npm run astro:build
